info.title: API Rewrite
info.summary: Référence de l'API Projets (Projets, clés API, modèles, webhooks).
info.description:
Référence publique complète des points de terminaison au niveau projet de l'API Rewrite v1.

Tous les endpoints renvoient une enveloppe cohérente (`ok`, `data` et `cursor` optionnel).
Utilisez soit un jeton Bearer (clé API) avec des scopes, soit une session cookie authentifiée.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Gérer des modèles SMS réutilisables avec variables.

data.name: order_shipped
data.content: Bonjour {{first_name}}, votre commande {{order_id}} est en route.

get.description:
Liste les modèles du projet avec pagination par curseur.

Utilisez `limit`, `after` et `before` pour paginer.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

templates = client.templates.list(project_id, {"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$templates = $rewrite->templates->list($projectId, [
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

templates = rewrite.templates.list(project_id, limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.ListTemplatesOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val templates = rewrite.templates.list(
    projectId,
    ListTemplatesOptions(limit = 20)
  )

  println(templates)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

value.name: order_shipped
value.content: Bonjour {{first_name}}, votre commande {{order_id}} est en route.

post.description: Crée un modèle réutilisable avec variables et valeurs de repli.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

template = client.templates.create(
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "name": "order_shipped",
        "content": "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
        "variables": [
            {"name": "first_name", "fallback": "customer"},
            {"name": "order_id", "fallback": "0000"},
        ],
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$template = $rewrite->templates->create([
  'project' => $projectId,
  'name' => 'order_shipped',
  'content' => 'Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.',
  'variables' => [
    ['name' => 'first_name', 'fallback' => 'customer'],
    ['name' => 'order_id', 'fallback' => '0000'],
  ],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

template = rewrite.templates.create(
  project: project_id,
  name: "order_shipped",
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
  variables: [
    { name: "first_name", fallback: "customer" },
    { name: "order_id", fallback: "0000" }
  ]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.CreateTemplateOptions
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val template = rewrite.templates.create(
    CreateTemplateOptions(
      project = projectId,
      name = "order_shipped",
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let projectId = "748395130237498368"

let template = try await rewrite.templates.create(
  project: projectId,
  name: "order_shipped",
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
  variables: [
    TemplateVariable(name: "first_name", fallback: "customer"),
    TemplateVariable(name: "order_id", fallback: "0000")
  ]
)

print(template)

patch.description: Met à jour partiellement le contenu du modèle et/ou les variables.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"
template_id = "748395130237498500"

template = client.templates.update(
    template_id,
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "content": "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
        "variables": [
            {"name": "first_name", "fallback": "customer"},
            {"name": "order_id", "fallback": "0000"},
        ],
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.UpdateTemplateOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"
  val templateId = "748395130237498500"

  val template = rewrite.templates.update(
    templateId,
    UpdateTemplateOptions(
      project = projectId,
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

bearerAuth.description: Envoyez votre clé API via `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments après cette valeur.

before.name: before
before.description: ID de curseur unique pour récupérer les éléments avant cette valeur.

persist.description: Indique si une autre page peut être demandée via `next`.

next.description: Curseur pour demander la page suivante (`after`).

data.description: Aucune donnée n'est renvoyée pour cette réponse.

OkEmptyResponse.description: Réponse réussie. Cet endpoint ne renvoie aucune donnée.

name.description: Clé de variable utilisée par votre application.

fallback.description: Valeur par défaut lorsque votre payload ne fournit pas la variable.

TemplateVariable.description: Variable nommée utilisée dans le corps d'un modèle.
